purpose: Production-readiness backlog for the Expo React Native Shopify shopping app.

tasks.title: Move mobile DTOs away from Shopify internal identifiers
tasks.rationale: The app currently stores and sends Shopify GIDs for products, variants, carts, and cart lines. That couples UI and persistence to Shopify internals.
acceptanceCriteria: Consume app-owned opaque IDs from the backend.
Do not persist raw gid://shopify/... values in AsyncStorage.
Update cart API payloads to use backend contract IDs.
Add migration/clear strategy for existing persisted POC cart state.

tasks.title: Stop relying on demo order and rebuy contracts
tasks.rationale: Orders currently depend on demo backend data and fake variant IDs. Purchase again will fail against a real store unless replaced by authenticated real order data.
acceptanceCriteria: Integrate with production order history endpoint.
Represent order states accurately.
Handle unavailable or discontinued rebuy items.
Show partial rebuy results when some variants cannot be added.

tasks.title: Add app authentication/session handling
tasks.rationale: The app has no authenticated identity, so cart ownership, order history, and purchase-again cannot be safely productionized.
acceptanceCriteria: Choose auth strategy compatible with Shopify/customer identity.
Store tokens in secure storage, not plain AsyncStorage.
Attach auth headers through the shared API client.
Handle token refresh, logout, and unauthorized states.

tasks.title: Validate backend base URL and environment separation
tasks.rationale: The app falls back to localhost and logs a warning if EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL is absent. Production builds should fail configuration validation rather than silently targeting localhost.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL at startup.
Fail production builds when the URL is missing or non-HTTPS.
Define separate dev/staging/prod env files.
Document EAS build environment configuration.

tasks.title: Productionize Shopify Checkout Sheet Kit integration
tasks.rationale: Checkout now uses Shopify Checkout Sheet Kit. Production still needs robust lifecycle handling, native build validation, and backend reconciliation.
acceptanceCriteria: Validate Checkout Sheet Kit on iOS and Android release builds.
Handle completed, close, error, and relevant pixel lifecycle events.
Do not treat Checkout Sheet completion alone as payment proof.
Add backend order/webhook reconciliation after completion.
Document native platform requirements including iOS minimum and Android minSdkVersion.

tasks.title: Serialize cart mutations on the client
tasks.rationale: Current Zustand actions allow overlapping add/update/remove calls. Race conditions can reconcile stale Shopify responses and corrupt local cart state.
acceptanceCriteria: Introduce a cart mutation queue or disable per-line controls while relevant mutations are pending.
Attach operation IDs to optimistic updates.
Ignore stale mutation responses.
Add tests for rapid repeated taps and concurrent line changes.

tasks.title: Add idempotency keys to cart write requests
tasks.rationale: Mobile retries and repeated taps can duplicate add-to-cart operations. The client should cooperate with backend idempotency.
acceptanceCriteria: Generate idempotency keys for cart create and add operations.
Send Idempotency-Key headers through the API client.
Persist pending operation keys until completion.
Handle duplicate idempotency responses gracefully.

tasks.title: Add request timeout, retry, and offline behavior
tasks.rationale: fetch calls have no explicit timeout, no network status awareness, and no offline queue for cart operations.
acceptanceCriteria: Add AbortController timeout support in the API client.
Retry safe reads with bounded policy.
Do not retry cart writes without idempotency.
Detect offline state and show intentional UI.
Queue or block cart mutations while offline.

tasks.title: Refresh persisted cart from backend on app start
tasks.rationale: The app persists cart lines locally but does not reconcile the stored cart with Shopify when the app opens. Carts can expire or change server-side.
acceptanceCriteria: Fetch persisted cartId on launch/resume.
Clear or recover expired carts.
Reconcile local items with backend cart state before checkout.
Show recovery UI when cart is no longer valid.

tasks.title: Add pagination/infinite scroll to product browsing
tasks.rationale: The Home screen only fetches the first 20 products. Real catalogs need paginated browsing and careful memory behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Switch products hook to useInfiniteQuery.
Use backend opaque pagination tokens.
Add onEndReached loading state.
Avoid duplicate products across pages.
Add tests for query keys and pagination behavior.

tasks.title: Optimize image loading and product card rendering
tasks.rationale: The grid uses remote images directly. Production catalogs need thumbnail sizing, cache policy, placeholders, and render profiling.
acceptanceCriteria: Request or consume optimized image URLs/sizes from backend.
Set explicit cache policy for expo-image.
Add image load failure fallback.
Profile list scrolling on low-end Android devices.
Tune FlatList parameters with real catalog data.

tasks.title: Add product detail and variant selection flow
tasks.rationale: The Home card auto-selects the first available variant. Production shopping needs explicit variant selection to avoid wrong size/color purchases.
acceptanceCriteria: Add product detail route using GET /api/products/:handle.
Display full images, description, options, availability, and price.
Require/select variant before adding to cart.
Handle unavailable option combinations.

tasks.title: Improve cart error recovery and partial failure UX
tasks.rationale: Cart sync errors are shown as a small text line on Home and a generic line in Cart. Production users need clear recovery actions.
acceptanceCriteria: Show actionable retry/reconcile/clear-cart controls.
Show per-line errors for unavailable variants or quantity issues.
Prevent checkout while cart is stale or failed.
Add accessible announcements for cart changes.

tasks.title: Add mobile analytics, crash reporting, and client logs
tasks.rationale: There is no visibility into product search latency, add-to-cart failures, checkout drops, crashes, or user flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Add crash reporting provider.
Add privacy-aware analytics events for search, add-to-cart, cart update, checkout start, checkout sheet completion signal.
Capture API error codes and latency.
Do not log PII or secrets.
Document event taxonomy.

tasks.title: Complete accessibility pass
tasks.rationale: The POC has basic labels in places, but cart controls, order cards, loading states, and dynamic updates need full screen reader and touch target coverage.
acceptanceCriteria: Add accessibilityRole, accessibilityLabel, and accessibilityHint for buttons and controls.
Verify minimum touch target sizes.
Support dynamic type where practical.
Test VoiceOver and TalkBack flows.
Add accessibility checklist to PR review.

tasks.title: Add production-grade test coverage
tasks.rationale: Current tests cover a few utilities/store behaviors. The app needs component, integration, and E2E coverage for core commerce flows.
acceptanceCriteria: Add React Native Testing Library.
Test Home loading/error/empty/success states.
Test cart modal quantity and removal behavior.
Test Checkout Sheet lifecycle handling.
Add Detox/Maestro E2E for browse, add to cart, checkout start, purchase again.
Run tests in CI.

tasks.title: Set up production Expo/EAS build and release process
tasks.rationale: The app is a local Expo POC. Production requires build profiles, signing, env separation, OTA update policy, and store readiness.
acceptanceCriteria: Add EAS build profiles for development, preview, and production.
Configure production bundle identifiers and app metadata.
Define OTA update policy and rollback strategy.
Add CI gates for lint, typecheck, tests, and build validation.
Document release checklist.

tasks.title: Resolve dependency audit and runtime version risks
tasks.rationale: npm install reported moderate vulnerabilities, and Expo had runtime issues under Node 25 in this environment. Production should pin supported Node and handle dependency risk.
acceptanceCriteria: Pin Node LTS version with .nvmrc or Volta.
Audit dependencies and decide fixes/acceptances.
Keep Expo SDK compatible versions aligned.
Add dependency update policy.
